---
name: New Project Type
about: Request a new project type for specsmith
title: "type: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Project Type Name
What should the type be called? (e.g., `game-dev`, `firmware-zephyr`)

## Description
What kind of projects does this type cover?

## Directory Structure
What directories should the scaffold create?

## Verification Tools
What lint/test/build/security/format tools should be used?

| Category | Tools |
|----------|-------|
| Lint | |
| Typecheck | |
| Test | |
| Security | |
| Build | |
| Format | |
| Compliance | |

## Governance Rules
Any domain-specific rules for AGENTS.md? (e.g., "all circuit designs require review before fabrication")

## CI/CD
What language setup and Docker images should CI use?
